name: prompt-optimization
description: Expert prompt optimization for LLMs and AI systems. Use when building
capabilities: Creates prompts with clear structure and role definitions
Implements few-shot learning with example-based prompts
Uses chain-of-thought reasoning for complex tasks
Optimizes prompts for better LLM response quality
Designs effective system prompts for AI agents
author: Joseph OBrien
securitySummary: This is a pure documentation skill containing only markdown guidance. No executable code, no scripts, no file system access, no network operations. All 31 static findings are false positives caused by the analyzer misinterpreting markdown backticks as shell execution and JSON metadata fields as security issues.
valueStatement: Poorly crafted prompts lead to inconsistent AI responses. This skill provides expert techniques for designing effective prompts including few-shot learning, chain-of-thought reasoning, and clear output formatting to improve LLM performance.
userTitle: Optimize AI prompts for better results
limitations: Does not execute code or interact with external systems
Does not provide real-time prompt testing capabilities
Does not integrate with specific LLM APIs directly
Requires user to apply recommendations manually

useCases.title: Build Better AI Agents
useCases.description: Design effective prompts for custom AI agents and assistants that produce consistent, high-quality outputs.

useCases.title: Improve AI Writing
useCases.description: Craft prompts that generate better written content with fewer revisions and more accurate results.

useCases.title: Optimize LLM Interactions
useCases.description: Enhance data analysis prompts with structured reasoning and clear output specifications for reliable results.

promptTemplates.title: Basic Optimization
promptTemplates.prompt: Optimize this prompt for better results: [insert your prompt]

promptTemplates.title: System Prompt
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a system prompt for a [role] that specializes in [task]. Include constraints and output format.

promptTemplates.title: Few-Shot Examples
promptTemplates.prompt: Implement few-shot learning for this task: [describe task]. Provide 3 example input-output pairs.

promptTemplates.title: Reasoning Prompts
promptTemplates.prompt: Design a chain-of-thought prompt for [complex task]. Include step-by-step reasoning requirements.

bestPractices: Define a clear role and expertise level for the AI to adopt
Provide 2-3 concrete examples demonstrating desired output format
Break complex tasks into explicit step-by-step reasoning steps
antiPatterns: Using vague instructions like 'write good content' instead of specific requirements
Overloading prompts with too many constraints at once
Skipping examples when output format matters significantly

faq.question: Which AI tools work with this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code for prompt optimization tasks.

faq.question: How many examples should I include?
faq.answer: Use 2-3 examples for few-shot learning. Too few lacks guidance, too many wastes context.

faq.question: Can I combine multiple techniques?
faq.answer: Yes, combine role definition, few-shot examples, and chain-of-thought reasoning for complex tasks.

faq.question: Is my data safe when using this skill?
faq.answer: This skill is purely documentation-based. No data is stored or transmitted externally.

faq.question: Why are my AI responses inconsistent?
faq.answer: Inconsistent prompts lead to variable results. Use clear structure, examples, and constraints for reliability.

faq.question: How is this different from generic prompt tips?
faq.answer: This skill provides specific, actionable patterns backed by LLM interaction best practices.
